signup.title: Create Account
signup.name: Full Name
signup.successMessage: Account created. Check your email to verify your address.

hero.title: Step into exclusive streetwear drops.
hero.description: Access limited edition pieces, early drops, and member-only sales. Join our community of fashion rebels.
hero.secureByDesign: Your account, your style, your culture.
hero.feature1: Early access to new collections and drops
hero.feature3: Seamless checkout in light and dark mode

footer.onboarding: Be part of the culture. Shop exclusive drops, connect with the community.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.
validation.nameTooLong: Name must be less than 100 characters.
validation.passwordMismatch: Passwords don't match. Please try again.
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.passwordTooLong: Password must be at most 72 characters.
validation.passwordNoLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter (a-z).
validation.passwordNoUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter (A-Z).
validation.passwordNoNumber: Password must contain at least one number (0-9).
validation.passwordNoSpecialChar: Password must contain at least one special character (!@#$%^&*) etc.
validation.passwordHasWhitespace: Password cannot contain spaces or whitespace.
validation.passwordSameAsPrevious: New password must be different from your current password.

verification.pendingDescription: We sent a verification link to your inbox. The link expires in 24 hours and works only once.
verification.pendingDescriptionWithEmail: We sent a verification link to {email}. The link expires in 24 hours and works only once.
verification.resendSuccess: If an account exists, a new verification email has been sent.
verification.resendCooldown: Please wait {seconds} seconds before requesting another email.
verification.resendLimit: Too many requests. Please try again in about an hour.
verification.successDescription: Your email has been confirmed. You can now sign in to your account.
verification.errorDescription: This verification link is invalid, expired, or has already been used. Request a new email below.
verification.alreadyVerifiedDescription: This email address is already verified. You can sign in to your account.
verification.confirmDescription: Click the button below to verify your email address. This step prevents automated link scanners from invalidating your link.

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.description: Your account does not have permission to access this area.

error.emailNotFound: No account found for that email.
error.emailAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists.
error.emailNotVerified: Your email address is not verified. Check your inbox or request a new link.
error.verificationResendCooldown: Please wait before requesting another verification email.
error.verificationResendLimit: Too many verification emails sent. Please try again later.
error.rateLimitExceeded: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
error.accountNotLinked: This account is not linked. Please sign in with the correct provider.
error.oauthError: Unable to sign in with this provider. Please try again.
error.invalidFields: Please check the form fields and try again.
error.databaseError: A server error occurred. Please try again later.
error.unknownError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
